question: Is the image rendered in a street graffiti illustration style (not a photograph) on a rough cement wall background?
Are there visible spray paint gradients, stencil letter edges, and paint drip textures present in the image?

Is the largest central graffiti text exactly: "Don't let today be nothing but complaints; write your ideas down, then go step by step and finish before you speak."? (Check for exact spelling and punctuation)
Is the central text the largest element, located in the center, and rendered in a graffiti style with gradients?

Is the left-side text exactly: "It's okay to move slowly, as long as you haven't stopped, and never forget why you started; doing just a little today still counts for something."? (Check for exact spelling and punctuation)
Is the left-side text rendered in a bold sans-serif stencil style?

Is the right-side text exactly: "Knowledge is not decoration; it is strength you can use when it matters most; whether reading or practicing, it all builds your foundation."? (Check for exact spelling and punctuation)
Is the right-side text rendered in a bold sans-serif stencil style?
Is the upper-middle text exactly: "To strive, to seek, to find, and not to yield; look up ahead, your journey is still long."? (Check for exact spelling and punctuation)
Is the upper-middle text rendered in an elegant serif script?
Is the lower math block exactly: "(x+1)^2=x^2+2x+1; when x=4, (x+1)^2=25; get the formula right and you won't panic."? (Check for exact spelling, numbers, and symbols)
Is the lower math block rendered in a monospace font and kept as one contiguous block?

Is the bottom notice exactly: "Please do not litter, and do not block this spot taking photos for too long; leave the path for others, and keep some peace for yourself."? (Check for exact spelling and punctuation)
Is the bottom notice rendered in a traditional serif font?
Is all text horizontal and forward-facing (not mirrored)?
Is the image free of any random words, numbers, or signatures other than the six specified text blocks?
Is the text clearly readable despite the rough wall texture and paint drip effects?
Are the text strokes free from garbled characters, distortion, or incomplete parts?
